name: Queen's Conquest
short_description: Experience the fast-paced deep battle system and a high degree of freedom in a fantasy world where Holy Knights and Wizards fight with the power of Mana!
detailed_description:
October update beta

October update is in beta phase. you can select it by right-clicking on the app name and selecting properties than going to the beta tab


About the Game

Queens Conquest is a fighting game that takes place in a fantasy world where Holy Knights and Wizards utilize the power of Mana to take down each other. Experience the fast-paced deep battle system that offers a high degree of freedom of expression and tons of options to develop your own original fighting style and combos. Choose between the enchanting noble Holy Knight Venicia Celine who specializes in ice and lightning magic or Cedric the mad scrapyard owner who fights Holy Knights with his devastating self made weapon "Dragon Wrecker", and more characters that will be revealed soon!
